query:
SELECT 
  c.name as customerName,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as totalRevenue,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as totalCost,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as margin
FROM customers c
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE c.name IN ('Albany Family Doctors', 'Aspley Firstcare Doctors', 'Ausdocs Carindale Pty Ltd', 'Kawana Family Clinic', 'Mount Cotton Medical Centre', 'Stafford Heights Medical Practice')
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY c.name;
